title: 商务部 海关总署公告2025年第18号
original_zh: 决定对下列物项实施出口管制
translation_en: It was decided to impose export controls on the items listed below.
notes: The enumerated scope covers specified items related to samarium, gadolinium, terbium, dysprosium, lutetium, scandium, and yttrium—not every rare-earth export.

title: 商务部 海关总署公告2025年第18号
original_zh: 出口经营者须向国务院商务主管部门申请出口许可
translation_en: Export operators must apply to the competent commerce department under the State Council for an export license.
notes: Official policy summary of Announcement 18; proves licensing structure, not automatic approval.

title: 商务部新闻发言人就中重稀土出口管制措施答记者问
original_zh: 已依法批准一定数量的合规申请
translation_en: A certain number of compliant applications have already been approved in accordance with law.
notes: Direct official evidence that licenses were being granted after the April controls.

title: 2025年5月全国出口重点商品量值表
notes: Shows aggregate rare-earth exports continued in May. The customs category is broader than the controlled-item list and cannot establish the volume of licensed controlled items.

title: 商务部新闻发言人就近期中方相关经贸政策措施情况答记者问
original_zh: 中国的出口管制不是禁止出口，对符合规定的申请将予以许可
translation_en: China's export controls are not an export ban; applications that meet the requirements will be licensed.
notes: Later official clarification in the context of the October measures; supportive context, not the legal text of the April controls.
